      ],
      "printed_row_totals": [0, 31912638, 110371308, 124483158, 172043600, 198453535, 242234827, 232647252, 90891189, 25949357],
      "printed_col_totals": [22239072, 241958790, 123578620, 152862098, 227512414, 269417320, 168966079, 21302822, 1149650]
    }
  ],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "<25", "sources": ["Under 20", "20 to 24"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25 to 29"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30 to 34"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "39", "sources": ["35 to 39"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "44", "sources": ["40 to 44"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "49", "sources": ["45 to 49"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "54", "sources": ["50 to 54"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "59", "sources": ["55 to 59"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "64", "sources": ["60 to 63"], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0},
    {"target": "70", "sources": [], "op": "weighted_avg", "weights_table": 0}
  ],
  "col_map": [
    {"target": "4", "sources": ["Under 1 year", "1 to 4"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "9", "sources": ["5 to 9"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "14", "sources": ["10 to 14"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "19", "sources": ["15 to 19"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "24", "sources": ["20 to 24"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25 to 29"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30 to 34"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "40", "sources": ["35 and over"], "op": "sum"}
  ],
  "notes": "The AV does not publish an average-salary-by-age-and-service exhibit directly. Exhibit C – Part III (page 35 of report, PDF page 46) publishes total lives (counts) and total annual salaries by age and service. Source table index 1 holds the total annual salary dollars per cell; source table index 0 holds the corresponding member counts (used as weights). Average salary per cell = total salary / count, which deterministic code must compute; I transcribe the raw totals and counts and declare weighted_avg for rows using counts as weights. IMPORTANT: because the target requires an average, code should divide the summed salary by the summed count for the corresponding aggregated cells rather than averaging the two published number types directly. The col_map uses 'sum' so that the salary totals (table 1) are summed across the '4' target (Under 1 year + 1 to 4); the same must be done to the counts (table 0) to correctly recompute per-cell averages. Row bins map nearly 1:1 to target ages: target '<25' combines source 'Under 20' and '20 to 24'; target '64' maps to source '60 to 63' (the source top age band is 60-63 due to mandatory retirement at 63). Target row '70' has no data in the source (no members above age 63) so it has an empty sources list. Column '40' maps to source '35 and over'. Total rows/columns excluded from cells but recorded in printed_row_totals/printed_col_totals. Empty source cells kept null. No suppressed '*' cells present."
}
